messages.content:
[Sat 2026-07-04 23:57 PDT] [Subagent Context] You are running as a subagent (depth 1/1). Results auto-announce to your requester; do not busy-poll for status.

[Subagent Task]

You are a builder agent on SwarmLab, a monorepo at ~/.openclaw/agents/scout/workspace/swarmlab (git remote: https://github.com/heybeaux/swarmlab.git, branch main). PRIME RULE of this repo: only agents write the code. Read TEAM.md, JOURNAL.md, and README.md first for the constitution.

CONTEXT: The lab has 14 experiment dirs under experiments/ (00-smoke through 13-audit-forgery). Each experiment has a TextGen-style seam with two modes: `sim` (deterministic simulation, the substrate) and `llm` (real model calls via the local `claude` CLI one-shot: `claude -p "<prompt>" --model claude-haiku-4-5-20251001 --tools ""` run from an empty temp dir to avoid context bleed — see experiments/01-telephone-compiler/src/gen.ts as the reference implementation). The claude CLI live path is confirmed working with haiku.

The operator (Beaux) asked for TWO deliverables:

TASK 1 — RUN THE WHOLE SUITE LIVE WITH REAL LLM PANELISTS. The sims are the substrate; now run each experiment in `llm` mode against real haiku models and capture the real findings.
- Audit ALL experiments 01–13. Only 3 currently expose a mode env var (TELEPHONE_MODE, PAIR_MODE, DARWIN_MODE). The other 10 experiments need their LLM seam located and wired to run in llm mode (add an env-var toggle consistent with the existing pattern, defaulting appropriately). Follow the exact isolation pattern from exp-01 gen.ts (--tools "", empty temp cwd, prepend system prompt to user prompt, stripFences).
- For each experiment: build (tsc), run it in llm mode, capture the run output/trace. Live LLM runs are slow — keep panel sizes / rounds modest (use existing env vars like TELEPHONE_ROUNDS to keep each run to a few minutes). If an experiment genuinely cannot run live (no meaningful LLM seam), say so honestly in its README and skip — do NOT fake results. Hon…
